channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitical news headlines curated from multiple sources

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran sets five conditions for resuming talks with US
item.description: Iran demands ending the war on all fronts, lifting sanctions, releasing frozen assets, compensating for war damage, and recognizing sovereignty rights over the Strait of Hormuz before any new negotiations with Washington.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine sanctions 66 Russian entities over military supply chain
item.description: President Zelensky imposed sanctions on 32 Russian companies and 34 individuals involved in supplying materials for ballistic missiles, surface-to-air systems, and drone production.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU expresses frustration over slow defense industry ramp-up
item.description: EU diplomat Kaja Kallas said the bloc is frustrated that despite billions in funding, defense production lags behind Ukraine, which has become a significant military-industrial power in four years.

item.title: 🔥 Major fire breaks out at Moscow tourist complex
item.description: A massive fire exceeding 3,000 square meters engulfed the Izmailovo Kremlin cultural and entertainment complex in eastern Moscow overnight, with the cause unclear.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK affirms Ukraine support amid domestic political turmoil
item.description: UK Europe Minister Stephen Doughty assured continued British backing for Ukraine despite Labour Party losses in local elections and pressure on PM Starmer.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Golden Dome missile shield to cost $1.2 trillion
item.description: US Congressional Budget Office estimates Trump's proposed missile defense system will cost nearly seven times his initial estimate. The system may not be able to stop an all-out missile attack.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE carried out secret attack on Iran risking Gulf war escalation
item.description: The United Arab Emirates covertly struck Iran during the ongoing war, according to sources. The attack risks drawing other Gulf states into the regional conflict.

item.title: 🌍 Global conflict displacements hit record 32.3 million in 2025
item.description: Internal displacements caused by violence or conflict reached a record high last year, surpassing disaster-driven displacement for the first time. Total global displacement now stands at 82.2 million.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israeli strikes in Lebanon kill 13 including two paramedics
item.description: Lebanon's health ministry says paramedics were carrying out a rescue mission in Nabatieh when they were killed. The strikes came in response to earlier attacks.

item.title: 📈 US Inflation Surges to 3.8% as Iran War Drives Energy Prices Higher
item.description: Consumer prices spiked in April with petrol prices up nearly 30% since last year, driven by the Iran conflict's impact on global oil markets and the Strait of Hormuz blockage.

item.title: 🇺🇬 Uganda's Museveni Sworn In for Record Seventh Term After Disputed Election
item.description: President Yoweri Museveni, 81, won January's disputed elections to extend his 40-year rule, making him one of Africa's longest-serving leaders.

item.title: 🇷🇸 Serbia Hosts First Joint Military Exercise With NATO Since Kosovo War
item.description: The two-week drills mark a historic shift for Serbia, coming less than 30 years after NATO bombed Belgrade during the Kosovo conflict.

item.title: ⚖️ Dali Ship Operator Charged Criminally for Baltimore Bridge Collapse
item.description: Federal prosecutors filed criminal charges against Synergy Marine for the Key Bridge collapse that killed six workers. The company faces conspiracy, obstruction, and misconduct charges.

item.title: 🇧🇸 Bahamas Heads to Polls in Snap Election With Immigration as Key Issue
item.description: Voters in the Bahamas are casting ballots in a three-way race dominated by concerns over immigration, the cost of living, and housing costs.

item.title: 🇪🇺 NATO to Create Vetted Counter-Drone Vendor Pool for Member Nations
item.description: NATO is establishing a common funding mechanism and approved vendor pool for counter-UAS systems, allowing member nations to test systems before procurement decisions.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Turkey Announces Propellant Breakthrough for Yildirimhan Long-Range Ballistic Missile
item.description: Turkish defense officials have announced a significant advancement in solid propellant technology for the Yildirimhan long-range ballistic missile program, boosting domestic missile development capabilities.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Trump Says Russia-Ukraine War End Is Very Close
item.description: US President Donald Trump stated that he believes the Russia-Ukraine war is nearing an end and that Moscow and Kyiv are moving closer to a settlement, amid ongoing diplomatic efforts.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian Drones Strike Russian Gas Facility 1,500km From Border
item.description: Ukrainian forces carried out drone strikes on a gas facility in Russia's Orenburg Oblast, more than 1,500 kilometers from the Ukrainian border, demonstrating continued deep-strike capabilities after the Victory Day ceasefire ended.

item.title: 🚢☢️🇰🇵 Russian ship that sank near Spain may have been carrying nuclear reactors to North Korea
item.description: A Russian vessel that sank in the Mediterranean may have been transporting nuclear reactor components destined for North Korea, raising concerns about illicit nuclear proliferation and sanctions evasion.

item.title: 🦠🏥 French hantavirus patient on artificial lung as outbreak spreads to 11 cases
item.description: A French woman infected with hantavirus on the MV Hondius cruise ship is in critical condition on an artificial lung, as the total number of confirmed cases grows to 11, prompting WHO to urge countries to prepare for more.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳🤝 Trump downplays differences with Xi over Iran as he heads to Beijing summit
item.description: President Trump departed for Beijing for a high-stakes summit with Chinese leader Xi Jinping, seeking to manage tensions over the Iran war and trade issues amid fragile ceasefire negotiations.

item.title: 👵🇫🇷🏛️ 85-year-old French widow detained in Trump immigration crackdown
item.description: An elderly French widow was caught up in the Trump immigration enforcement operations, describing her detention experience as the administration intensifies border enforcement.

item.title: 🌍 Global conflict displacements hit record 32.3 million in 2025
item.description: Internal displacements from violence and conflict reached an all-time high in 2025, surpassing disaster-driven displacements for the first time. Iran and DR Congo accounted for two-thirds of all conflict-driven displacements.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK sends warship, jets and drones for Strait of Hormuz mission
item.description: The UK pledged drones, fighter jets and a warship to a 40-nation mission to safeguard shipping through the Strait of Hormuz. HMS Dragon will join the defensive operation as Iran continues to control the vital waterway.

item.title: 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia carried out covert strikes on Iran during war
item.description: Saudi Arabia launched unpublicized strikes on Iran in retaliation for attacks on the kingdom during the Middle East war, then engaged in intensive diplomatic contact with Tehran to de-escalate, officials said.
